description: Accounts of small sums concerning transport, including that of six aḥmāl (= twelve aʿdāl). Dated: 441 AH, which is 1049/50 CE. Four pages. Perhaps written by a Tāhartī. See also ENA 3770.5. (Information from Goitein’s index card)
description_he: חשבונות סכומים קטנים הקשורים להובלה; 441 להג'רה (1049/50 לספירה); ארבעה עמודים
